posts.author: mmckay (Michael McKay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Add the button column to be allowed to be used in a subitem and not just main items.

What are you trying to achieve

I would really like the ability to use the button column within sub-items, not just on main items. For example, it would be extremely useful to create a button that automatically pushes a sub-item’s due date forward by three working days. While this feature currently works at the main item level, it is not available in sub-items. Adding this option would unlock significant benefits, especially since multiple users could leverage buttons in sub-items for streamlining workflows, improving consistency, and saving time in their day-to-day processes.
